impact: This keeps future `ppd.extraction.solar_permit_requirements` proposals narrow by enforcing a 180-line physical size limit and rejecting broad generated-module shapes before they can expand the PP&D extractor surface.
summary: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for the solar permit requirements extractor.
target_task: Task checkbox-79: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.solar_permit_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
